proposed_hypotheses.text: Patients with `stage_iv` = 1 have lower mean `pfs_months` than patients with `stage_iv` = 0, after adjustment for demographic, disease, biomarker, treatment, laboratory, comorbidity, and metastatic-site covariates.

analyses.code: Multivariable OLS: pfs_months ~ stage_iv + age_years + sex_female + ecog_ps + biomarkers + treatments + labs + comorbidities + metastatic sites.
analyses.result_summary: Adjusted coefficient for `stage_iv` was -1.549 months, indicating substantially shorter PFS for stage IV disease (p < 1e-300).

proposed_hypotheses.text: Each one-point increase in `ecog_ps` is associated with lower `pfs_months`, after multivariable adjustment.

analyses.code: Multivariable OLS with the same adjustment set as iteration 1.
analyses.result_summary: Adjusted coefficient for `ecog_ps` was -1.172 months per one-point increase (p < 1e-300).

proposed_hypotheses.text: Higher `age_years` is associated with higher `pfs_months`, after multivariable adjustment.

analyses.code: Multivariable OLS with the same adjustment set as iteration 1.
analyses.result_summary: Adjusted coefficient for `age_years` was +0.176 months per year (p < 1e-300).

proposed_hypotheses.text: Patients with `has_brain_mets` = 1 have lower `pfs_months` than those with `has_brain_mets` = 0, after adjustment.

analyses.code: Multivariable OLS with the same adjustment set as iteration 1.
analyses.result_summary: Adjusted coefficient for `has_brain_mets` was -0.983 months (p < 1e-300).

proposed_hypotheses.text: Patients with `liver_mets` = 1 have lower `pfs_months` than those with `liver_mets` = 0, after adjustment.

analyses.code: Multivariable OLS with the same adjustment set as iteration 1.
analyses.result_summary: Adjusted coefficient for `liver_mets` was -0.019 months and was not statistically significant (p = 0.191).

proposed_hypotheses.text: Higher `albumin_g_dl` is associated with higher `pfs_months`, after multivariable adjustment.

analyses.code: Multivariable OLS with the same adjustment set as iteration 1.
analyses.result_summary: Adjusted coefficient for `albumin_g_dl` was +0.475 months per g/dL (p < 1e-300).

proposed_hypotheses.text: Higher `weight_loss_pct_6mo` is associated with lower `pfs_months`, after multivariable adjustment.

analyses.code: Multivariable OLS with the same adjustment set as iteration 1.
analyses.result_summary: Adjusted coefficient for `weight_loss_pct_6mo` was -0.077 months per percentage point (p < 1e-300).

proposed_hypotheses.text: Higher `ldh_u_l` is associated with lower `pfs_months`, after multivariable adjustment.

analyses.code: Multivariable OLS using `ldh_u_l / 100` so the coefficient is months per 100 U/L.
analyses.result_summary: Adjusted coefficient for each 100 U/L increase in `ldh_u_l` was -0.052 months (p = 2.22e-16).

proposed_hypotheses.text: Higher `ki67_pct` is associated with lower `pfs_months`, after multivariable adjustment.

analyses.code: Multivariable OLS with the same adjustment set as iteration 1.
analyses.result_summary: Adjusted coefficient for `ki67_pct` was -0.0189 months per percentage point (p < 1e-300).

proposed_hypotheses.text: Patients with `er_positive` = 1 have higher `pfs_months` than patients with `er_positive` = 0, after adjustment.

analyses.code: Multivariable OLS with the same adjustment set as iteration 1.
analyses.result_summary: Adjusted coefficient for `er_positive` was +0.532 months (p < 1e-300).

proposed_hypotheses.text: Patients with `pr_positive` = 1 have higher `pfs_months` than patients with `pr_positive` = 0, after adjustment for `er_positive` and other covariates.

analyses.code: Multivariable OLS with `er_positive`, `her2_positive`, treatment, disease, laboratory, and comorbidity covariates.
analyses.result_summary: Adjusted coefficient for `pr_positive` was only +0.014 months and was not significant (p = 0.330).

proposed_hypotheses.text: Patients with `her2_positive` = 1 have lower `pfs_months` than patients with `her2_positive` = 0, after adjustment.

analyses.code: Multivariable OLS with the same adjustment set as iteration 1.
analyses.result_summary: Adjusted coefficient for `her2_positive` was -0.471 months (p < 1e-300).

proposed_hypotheses.text: Patients with `pik3ca_mutation` = 1 have lower `pfs_months` than patients with `pik3ca_mutation` = 0, after adjustment.

analyses.code: Multivariable OLS with the same adjustment set as iteration 1.
analyses.result_summary: Adjusted coefficient for `pik3ca_mutation` was -0.582 months (p < 1e-300).

proposed_hypotheses.text: Patients with `treatment_palbociclib` = 1 have higher `pfs_months` than patients with `treatment_palbociclib` = 0, after adjustment.

analyses.code: Multivariable OLS with clinical, biomarker, treatment, laboratory, comorbidity, and metastatic-site covariates.
analyses.result_summary: Adjusted coefficient for `treatment_palbociclib` was +1.101 months (p < 1e-300).

proposed_hypotheses.text: The association of `treatment_palbociclib` with higher `pfs_months` is stronger in hormone-receptor-positive/HER2-negative patients, defined by (`er_positive` = 1 or `pr_positive` = 1) and `her2_positive` = 0, than in other patients.

analyses.code: Adjusted interaction model: pfs_months ~ treatment_palbociclib * HR_positive_HER2_negative + clinical/biomarker controls.
analyses.result_summary: The interaction coefficient for `treatment_palbociclib` by HR-positive/HER2-negative status was +1.796 months (p < 1e-300). Within that subgroup, the unadjusted palbociclib mean difference was +1.708 months.

proposed_hypotheses.text: The association of `treatment_palbociclib` with higher `pfs_months` is weaker in patients with `pik3ca_mutation` = 1 than in patients with `pik3ca_mutation` = 0.

analyses.code: Adjusted interaction model: pfs_months ~ treatment_palbociclib * pik3ca_mutation + clinical/biomarker controls.
analyses.result_summary: The `treatment_palbociclib:pik3ca_mutation` interaction coefficient was -1.665 months (p < 1e-300), supporting attenuation of palbociclib benefit in PIK3CA-mutated tumors.

proposed_hypotheses.text: The association of `treatment_palbociclib` with higher `pfs_months` is weaker when `ki67_pct` is at least 20 than when `ki67_pct` is below 20.

analyses.code: Adjusted interaction model: pfs_months ~ treatment_palbociclib * I(ki67_pct >= 20) + clinical/biomarker controls.
analyses.result_summary: The interaction coefficient for `treatment_palbociclib` by `ki67_pct >= 20` was -1.445 months (p < 1e-300).

proposed_hypotheses.text: The association of `treatment_palbociclib` with higher `pfs_months` is weaker in triple-negative patients, defined by `er_positive` = 0, `pr_positive` = 0, and `her2_positive` = 0, than in non-triple-negative patients.

analyses.code: Adjusted interaction model: pfs_months ~ treatment_palbociclib * triple_negative + clinical/biomarker controls.
analyses.result_summary: The `treatment_palbociclib:triple_negative` interaction coefficient was -1.380 months (p < 1e-300). Within triple-negative patients, the unadjusted palbociclib difference was +0.004 months (p = 0.928).

proposed_hypotheses.text: The association of `treatment_palbociclib` with higher `pfs_months` is weaker in patients with `her2_positive` = 1 than in patients with `her2_positive` = 0.

analyses.code: Adjusted interaction model: pfs_months ~ treatment_palbociclib * her2_positive + clinical/biomarker controls.
analyses.result_summary: The `treatment_palbociclib:her2_positive` interaction coefficient was -1.337 months (p < 1e-300), indicating markedly less palbociclib-associated PFS gain in HER2-positive disease.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Among patients with `er_positive` = 1, those with `treatment_tamoxifen` = 1 have higher mean `pfs_months` than those with `treatment_tamoxifen` = 0.

analyses.code: Welch two-sample comparison within `er_positive` = 1 patients.
analyses.result_summary: Within ER-positive patients, mean PFS was 4.881 months with tamoxifen vs 4.858 without, a +0.023-month difference that was not significant (p = 0.450).

proposed_hypotheses.text: Among patients with `her2_positive` = 1 or `her2_amplification` = 1, those with `treatment_trastuzumab` = 1 have higher mean `pfs_months` than those with `treatment_trastuzumab` = 0.

analyses.code: Welch two-sample comparison within patients with `her2_positive` = 1 or `her2_amplification` = 1.
analyses.result_summary: In the HER2-positive/amplified subgroup, mean PFS was 4.505 months with trastuzumab vs 4.549 without, a -0.044-month difference (p = 0.367). The direction did not support the hypothesis.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Among patients with `brca1_mutation` = 1 or `brca2_mutation` = 1, those with `treatment_olaparib` = 1 have higher mean `pfs_months` than those with `treatment_olaparib` = 0.

analyses.code: Welch two-sample comparison within patients with `brca1_mutation` = 1 or `brca2_mutation` = 1.
analyses.result_summary: In the BRCA-mutated subgroup, mean PFS was 4.707 months with olaparib vs 4.691 without, a +0.016-month difference that was not significant (p = 0.733).

proposed_hypotheses.text: Among triple-negative patients, defined by `er_positive` = 0, `pr_positive` = 0, and `her2_positive` = 0, those with `treatment_pembrolizumab` = 1 have higher mean `pfs_months` than those with `treatment_pembrolizumab` = 0.

analyses.code: Welch two-sample comparison within triple-negative patients.
analyses.result_summary: Within triple-negative patients, mean PFS was 4.354 months with pembrolizumab vs 4.302 without, a +0.052-month difference that was not significant (p = 0.368).

proposed_hypotheses.text: Among triple-negative patients, defined by `er_positive` = 0, `pr_positive` = 0, and `her2_positive` = 0, those with `treatment_sacituzumab_govitecan` = 1 have higher mean `pfs_months` than those with `treatment_sacituzumab_govitecan` = 0.

analyses.code: Welch two-sample comparison within triple-negative patients.
analyses.result_summary: Within triple-negative patients, mean PFS was 4.365 months with sacituzumab govitecan vs 4.303 without, a +0.062-month difference that was not significant (p = 0.316).

proposed_hypotheses.text: The association of `treatment_pembrolizumab` with higher `pfs_months` is weaker among patients with `nlr` >= 4 than among patients with `nlr` < 4.

analyses.code: Adjusted interaction model: pfs_months ~ treatment_pembrolizumab * I(nlr >= 4) + clinical/biomarker controls.
analyses.result_summary: The interaction coefficient for `treatment_pembrolizumab` by `nlr >= 4` was -0.067 months, but it did not reach statistical significance (p = 0.062).
